title: Templates with Macros
excerpt: Looking to generate templates from our boards that have Macros in them. Working with Docugen, and viewed Docotive, but both only able to save *.docx when we need to have *.docm. We have word templates we currently use wi…

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml: Looking to generate templates from our boards that have Macros in them. Working with Docugen, and viewed Docotive, but both only able to save *.docx when we need to have *.docm. We have word templates we currently use with bookmarks and visual basic macros. Does anyone have any ideas about how to create something like that?
